heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6606 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments2024—Subsec. (a). substituted “2025 through 2029” for “2019 through 2023”.Pub. L. 118–1592019— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to the Fund $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2009.”Pub. L. 116–9
amendments: Amendments2024—Subsec. (a). substituted “2025 through 2029” for “2019 through 2023”.Pub. L. 118–1592019— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to the Fund $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2005 through 2009.”Pub. L. 116–9

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Fund $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029.
not less than $1,510,000 shall be used by the Secretary for marine turtle conservation purposes in accordance with this chapter; and

of the amounts in excess of the amount described in paragraph (1), not less than 40 percent shall be used by the Secretary for freshwater turtle and tortoise conservation purposes in accordance with this chapter.
